title: Hayek's Money Competition
description: Hayek's money competition thesis argues that currencies should compete rather than be monopolized by the state. It frames Bitcoin as a market alternative in monetary selection.

resources.title: The Road to Serfdom (F. A. Hayek)
resources.notes: Hayek's broader framework for why decentralized market coordination matters.

resources.title: Denationalisation of Money
resources.notes: Accessible edition and context for the argument.

resources.title: Hayek: The Use of Knowledge in Society
resources.notes: Background on Hayek's coordination argument that informs monetary competition thinking.
